Nayak, 2, Chitrakut Apartments, 18th Cross Road, Mal leshwaram West, Bangalore-560055. Child Health, Care, Welfare or Child Development (ii) Dr. Vandana Prasad, L 91, Sector 25, Noida, U.P.-201301 Ms. Nina P. Nayak will hold office for a period of three years with effect from the date of taking charge or till she attains the age of 60 years or until further orders, whichever is earlier. Dr. Vandana Prasad will hold office up to21 2013 with effect from the date of taking charge or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [No. 3-11/2010-CW-11 VIVEK JOSH', Jt. Secy.
